# Project Configuration

This file is the living configuration document for this project. It is auto-populated by workflow skills as they run and serves as the primary context source for all agents.

**Do not edit this file manually** unless correcting an error. Skills update their respective sections automatically.

- [Skills](.claude/skills/) — All available workflow skills
